fields.summary: Re: HEAL-33537 Text notices being sent to me

content.text: This one was Jemimah and I had one last week that was Stephanie. Idman said he fixed Stephanies but getting Jemimah’s now. Both are scheduling coordinators
Text notices being sent to me
Can you tell me who exactly was texting this customer instead of you? Which member of the scheduling team? Just trying to trace down the phone numbers involved and how they are getting crossed.
Text notices being sent to me
This is shared with Steph SIlva.

requestType.name: General Help Desk Request

status.name: In Progress

content.text: We have assigned your request HEAL-33583 to an appropriate Help Desk team member. They will reach out to you shortly with an update.
I’m going to try to meet with Idman to review this so I can document how to fix this when it happens. I’ll update you as soon as this is resolved.
Stephanie Silva reacted to your message:

When you say you are getting notifications, can you please explain what those are? Are you getting texts from the patient, or are you getting emails. Can you please reply to this ticket with an example? Please do not reply back to
as that will create a duplicate ticket.
Emails of the texts being received .
Can you send me a screenshot of those? I need information from them to see where they are originating.
SMS-Magic: New Message received from Thomas Evangelista via sms
You have received a new incoming message from 15087261435:
SMS Text: Could you call me back please to discuss lab results
Text notices being sent to me
_Can you send me a screenshot of those? I need information from them to see where they are originating.
Text notices being sent to me
This is shared with Steph Silva.

This is a different issue than we have seen before and is originating in Salesforce. I am going to assign this to my SF Admin to investigate. This is low priority, so it may take him a while to get an answer, due to some critical priorities our team is addressing currently.

Steph is receiving an email letting her know that the customer has responded back to her text. However, she did not send the text, Jemimah did. Can you figure out what causes this email to fire when texts are sent back by the patient and can you determine why this email would be sent to Stephanie Silva instead of Jemimah? Robert did help with this configuration and flow, so he may have some valuable information.
